page.title: Global Variables
page.description: Manage global variable definitions used in fable configuration interpolation.

empty.title: No global variables
empty.description: Create a global variable to use ${variable} interpolation across all fable configurations.

form.title: Create Global Variable
form.keyInvalid: Key must start with a letter or underscore and contain only letters, digits and underscores. Hyphens, spaces and other characters are not allowed.
form.publicHelp: Public variables are visible to all users (admin only)
form.overriddableHelp: Allow users to shadow this variable with their own value of the same name
form.overriddableTooltip: Overriddable: a user can define a private variable with the same name and it will win during resolution. Pinned (off): the public value always wins, even if a user defines their own.

panel.title: Variables

helpers.title: Helpers
helpers.tooltip: Custom filters and globals you can use inside ${...} expressions.

panel.help:
Use ${name} syntax in block configuration values to reference dynamic variables.

Intrinsic — system-provided, always available (e.g., runId, submitDatetime). startDatetime and attemptCount update on each retry.

Global — user-defined key-value pairs shared across fables. Manage them via the admin page.

Local — scoped to this blueprint only. Override global variables of the same name.

Context — injected automatically per-execution (e.g., by the scheduler). Not shown here.

Precedence: Intrinsic → Global → Local → Context.
Pinned variables (startDatetime, attemptCount) always use the intrinsic value.
panel.localTooltip: Variables scoped to this blueprint. Override global variables of the same name.
panel.addLocalHint: Add one to override a global value for this blueprint only.
panel.localKeyInvalid: Use letters, digits and underscores only — no hyphens, spaces or other characters.

field.cannotSwitchBack: Clear the variable expression to switch back

datePreview.hasTime: Date field — the value carries a time component
datePreview.floorDayTooltip: Appends `| floor_day` to truncate the expression to midnight
